title: Refreshingly Citrusy Italian Gherkin Torta Caprese
description: A light and refreshing Italian dish featuring gherkin relish and coconut cream, served in an agave leaf vessel. This vegetarian friendly torta caprese is perfect for a summer lunch.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender or food processor, combine chopped gherkin pickles, coconut cream, lemon juice, salt, and pepper, and blend until smooth.
In a large bowl, combine the gherkin relish, mozzarella cheese, and chopped basil leaves, and mix well.
Spoon the gherkin and mozzarella mixture onto the center of each agave leaf.
Drizzle the olive oil over the top of each torta caprese.
Bake the torta caprese in the preheated oven for 10 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and the agave leaf is slightly toasted.
Remove the torta caprese from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes.
Serve the torta caprese warm, garnished with additional chopped basil leaves if desired.
